testcase.name: test_full_lifecycle_flow

failure.message:
AssertionError: Settlement failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_escrow_websocket_events.py:204: in test_full_lifecycle_flow assert settle_response.status_code == 200, f"Settlement failed: {settle_response.text}" E AssertionError: Settlement failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
